---
title: "Time Series & Econometrics"
description: "ARIMA, VAR, cointegration, GARCH, structural breaks, panel data."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="time-series-econometrics"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Time Series & Econometrics</h1>
  <p class="lead">ARIMA, VAR, cointegration, GARCH, structural breaks, panel data.</p>
</div>
```
